package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for string_format_in_structured_logger: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `logger.Info(fmt.Sprintf("user %s logged in", user))` instead of structured fields
type CaseStringFormatInStructuredLoggerDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseStringFormatInStructuredLoggerModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseStringFormatInStructuredLoggerRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseStringFormatInStructuredLoggerModel
}

type CaseStringFormatInStructuredLoggerService struct {
    repo *CaseStringFormatInStructuredLoggerRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseStringFormatInStructuredLoggerAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveStringFormatInStructuredLogger(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseStringFormatInStructuredLoggerDTO) error {
    focus := "string_format_in_structured_logger"
    _ = focus
    msg := fmt.Sprintf("rule=%s input=%s", "string_format_in_structured_logger", input)
    log.Print(msg)
    string_format_structured_logger_positive := map[string]int{"string": 1, "format": 2, "structured": 3, "logger": 4}
    string_format_structured_logger_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    string_positive_0 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = string_positive_0
    format_positive_1 := string_format_structured_logger_positive["format"] + len(input)
    _ = format_positive_1
    structured_positive_2 := string_format_structured_logger_positive["structured"] + len(input)
    _ = structured_positive_2
    logger_positive_3 := string_format_structured_logger_positive["logger"] + len(input)
    _ = logger_positive_3
    return nil
}
